name: file-nesting-explorer-monorepo
description: Monorepo root for the React File Nesting Explorer VS Code extension and its companion React webview.

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:webview && npm run build:extension
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run -w file-nesting-explorer package
scripts.package:vscode: npm run build && node scripts/package-with-platform.js vscode
scripts.package:openvsx: npm run build && node scripts/package-with-platform.js openvsx
scripts.publish: npm run build && npm run -w file-nesting-explorer publish
